company.name: Eisai Co., Ltd.
company.subtitle: Total Revenue JPY 790B / ~\$5.3B FY2025 | Leqembi (anti-amyloid AD; w/ Biogen) +109% YoY | Lenvima (multi-kinase; w/ Merck) | Dayvigo orexin DORA | E2086 orexin agonist Ph3 narcolepsy
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (JPY 100B+ op cash flow); Biogen 50/50 Leqembi profit-share + Merck 50/50 Lenvima/Keytruda combo profit-share

assets.name: Leqembi (lecanemab) -- anti-amyloid mAb (early AD; w/ Biogen 50/50)
assets.stage: Commercial (~$510M Eisai-share 2025, +109% YoY); 53 countries approved; SC formulation pending

indications.name: Early Alzheimer's disease (MCI + mild dementia w/ amyloid+)

market.notes: Anti-amyloid mAb targeting protofibrils. Class peers: Kisunla (Lilly donanemab), Aduhelm withdrawn. Trontinemab (Roche brain-shuttle Ph3) -- transformational competitor. SC formulation Q-weekly maintenance pending FDA review.

indications.name: Heritage tail (Aricept + Inovelon + Methycobal + ROW alliance)

market.notes: Heritage tail (~JPY 220B / \$1.5B): Aricept (donepezil AD legacy generic), Inovelon (rufinamide LGS), Methycobal (mecobalamin B12 Japan), Eisai legacy GI products, alliance income (Lenvima + Leqembi co-promote with Merck/Biogen), Other Pharma revenue. Mature ROW + Japan brand-loyal.

mega_bear.narrative: Leqembi growth slows vs ARIA + Kisunla + Trontinemab; Lenvima generic; Dayvigo niche
events: X Leqembi capped at \$1B Eisai-share by ARIA + Kisunla + Trontinemab
X E2086 orexin Ph2 fails (Takeda dominates)

bear.narrative: Leqembi steady ramp; Lenvima maintains; Dayvigo modest

base.narrative: Leqembi \$3B+ peak Eisai-share; SC + maintenance + ARIA biomarker management; orexin pipeline emerges
events: V Leqembi \$3B+ Eisai-share peak with SC
V Lenvima Keytruda combos + new tumor types
V E2086 orexin agonist Ph3 positive narcolepsy

bull.narrative: Leqembi \$5B+ blockbuster; orexin franchise (Dayvigo + E2086) emerges; tasurgratinib approved
events: V Leqembi \$5B Eisai-share + earlier-line + biomarker selection
V Orexin franchise \$2B+ across DORA + agonist

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Leqembi dominant pre-symptomatic AD prevention market + multi-pipeline

lastData.title: FY2025 Total Revenue JPY 790B / ~\$5.3B. Leqembi +109% YoY ramp transformational. Lenvima + Halaven oncology + Dayvigo orexin steady.
points: FY2025 Total Revenue JPY 790B (~\$5.3B at JPY/USD 0.0067)
Leqembi 50/50 with Biogen; Eisai books revenue, shares profit
Dayvigo (lemborexant DORA insomnia) \$390M (+18%); FY guide \$58B JPY = \$390M
Leqembi SC formulation FDA review pending H2 2026
E2086 orexin 2 agonist Ph2 narcolepsy (vs Takeda TAK-861 Ph3 leader)
Tasurgratinib pan-FGFR Ph2 cholangiocarcinoma + other FGFR tumors

nextCatalyst.title: Leqembi SC FDA approval + Tasurgratinib Ph3 + E2086 orexin Ph3
thresholds: H2 2026: Leqembi SC formulation FDA approval (Q-weekly maintenance)
2027: E2086 orexin agonist Ph3 narcolepsy (vs Takeda TAK-861)

risks: Leqembi vs Kisunla (Lilly donanemab) competing PRESERVED biomarker selection + Trontinemab (Roche brain-shuttle Ph3)
Leqembi ARIA-E/H biomarker risk drives REMS + monitoring complexity
E2086 orexin agonist Ph2: Takeda TAK-861 oveporexton Ph3 ahead
Biogen 50/50 Leqembi economics + Merck 50/50 Lenvima profit-share complexity
